summary: The stock's dividend has more than doubled in five years.

headline: American Express Growth Story Links Sports Experiences And New World Trade Center HQ
summary: American Express announced expanded partnerships with major sports teams and venues in the New York/New Jersey and Atlanta areas, broadening its footprint in live entertainment. The company is planning a custom-built global headquarters at 2 World Trade Center in New York City, designed to support long term growth and employee well being. These moves aim to deepen cardholder engagement through premium experiences while reinforcing American Express's role in New York City's economic...

headline: If You Invested $1,000 in Visa or American Express 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Today
summary: Ten years ago, a $1,000 investment split between Visa (NYSE: V) and American Express (NYSE: AXP) would have seemed like a safe bet on global payments. The results might surprise you, depending on which company you favored. Two Networks, Two Very Different Paths Visa built its decade on one idea: own the rails, not the ... headline: 5 Dividend Stocks Are 60% of Berkshire Hathaway After Buffett’s Q4 Selling Spree
summary: If any investor has stood the test of time, it’s Warren Buffett, and with good reason. For 60 years, the “Oracle of Omaha” had a rock-star-like presence in the investing world, and his annual Berkshire Hathaway shareholders meeting drew thousands of loyal investors. They were stunned at last year’s meeting when Buffett announced he would ... 5 Dividend Stocks Are 60% of Berkshire Hathaway After Buffett’s Q4 Selling Spree
